name: Dandy's world Pick me problems (2)
description:
So there was a new toon her name was Melanie and she looked JUST like Vee but more pinkish

Melanie would usally bully shelly and Cosmo for NO REASON of course and always flirts with Sprout

Melanie: oh sprout how I love the way you talk~

Sprout: uhh... Can you leave me alone...?

Sprout did NOT like her back, though he didn't wanna be mean and kept denying her but she kept trying

later

Cosmo: HEY GIVE ME BACK MY BRACELET!

Melanie held up Cosmo's bracelet which was a friendship bracelet for him and sprout as she ripped it with the beads going everywhere

Shelly: WHAT DID YOU DO?!

Melanie: the best thing ever!

you saw what happened shocked from the sudden event as Cosmo looked at the Broken bracelet while on his knees slightly crying

you wanted revenge

LATER later

Vee: who does she think she is...?

Astro: I'm gonna have nightmares of this event...

Pebble: growling

Poppy: how the hell was she even allowed

Boxten: oh God... I think I'm gonna be sick

Glisten: God... SHE'S RUINING MY STYLE

dandy: please tell me she's not gonna get her way...

Flutter: ... (I can't believe a creature like her got in the main cast...)

Looey: Shrimpo I think I'm ready to be popped by that thumbtack...

Goob: she is totally not getting my hugs...!

Scraps: I hope she can shut up I can smell her breath from here!

Toodles: I can't look...!

Rodger: it's okay toodles...

Teagan: spits out tea

Cosmo: still crying

Shelly: trying to comfort Cosmo

Yatta: I WANNA SLAP HER WITH A BAT!!

Shrimpo: I HATE HER!

Tisha: holding bug spray with a disgusted face

Gigi: looks like she's held gunshot

Connie: the more she does this makes it look pathetic...

Finn: she smells like fish... WHEN'S THE LAST TIME SHE SHOWERED?!

Brightney: I need to read more books to forget about her..

Razzle: dazzle I think I understand what you mean by "oh the misery"...

Dazzle: thank you for understanding...
creator: Angele_Nightstar
